quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure — percentages (33.4%, 30.4%), ratios (1.129x, 1.538x, 14.9x), and gaps ($761.53) rather than bare rankings.

specificity.why: Each recommendation names a specific product/region with figures, e.g. 'Reprice or bundle Sprocket: 238 units sold return only $1,130.50' and 'Investigate West, which trails North by 35% ($761.53 gap)'.

insight_density.why: Surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations like Gadget's concentration ('33.4% of revenue from only 7 orders') and Sprocket's volume/revenue outlier ('238 units...ranks last on revenue because its unit price is $4.75').

quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — e.g. Gadget at '33.4% of revenue,' 'trailing Gadget by a factor of 1.129,' Sprocket '238 units (14.9x Gadget's volume),' and North '1.538x West's $1,414.82.'

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products/regions with data — 'Prioritize Gadget stock... $341.71 per order,' 'Investigate West, which trails North by 35% ($761.53 gap),' and 'Reprice or bundle Sprocket: 238 units... only $1,130.50.'

insight_density.why: It surfaces several actionable non-obvious observations, notably Sprocket's volume-vs-revenue outlier ('238 units... yet ranks last on revenue because its unit price is $4.75') and Gadget's revenue concentration 'from only 7 orders,' plus the uneven North-West regional gap.

quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure — percentages (33.4%, 30.4%), ratios (1.129x, 1.538x, 14.9x), per-order values ($341.71), and gaps ($761.53).

specificity.why: Each recommendation names a specific product/region with data — 'Prioritize Gadget stock...33.4% from just 7 orders', 'Investigate West, which trails North by 35% ($761.53 gap)', and 'Reprice or bundle Sprocket: 238 units...only $1,130.50'.

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations like Gadget's revenue concentration despite low order count, Sprocket's volume-vs-revenue outlier ('238 units...ranks last...because its unit price is $4.75'), and the uneven North-West regional gap.
